_comment: Patriot variant — red-white-blue 3-stop vertical gradient on all armor slots. Accessories (rings, belt, neck) get gold. Weapons get a red-dominant override. Bags get bronze. Showcases middle_color 3-stop gradients.

default_button._comment: See .bin/DEFAULTS.md: Slots Configuration > default_button. Uses button atlas row 1, col 1 with patriot gradient.

default_item._comment: See .bin/DEFAULTS.md: Slots Configuration > default_item. Items tiled at 28px with slight transparency.

patriot_weapon._comment: Variant-specific: bright red fading through lighter red/pink middle to bright blue for weapons
